1696420.name: Movie Studio 18 Platinum Steam Edition
1696420.description:
Edit your gaming videos and share them on Twitch or YouTube, it is easy and fast with Movie Studio. Easily Record and Edit your clips with the editing wizard or film simultaneously with the Multicam. Your Let’s play videos have never been so amazing.

A POWERHOUSE FOR YOUR CREATIVITY

INFUSION Engine 2
The engine that powers Movie Studio builds on native hardware support for graphics cards by Intel, NVIDIA and AMD. The result is instant and seamless previews without the need for proxy files or time-consuming rendering.

WIZARDS

Import, optimize, edit – the fastest way to start making your own movies. For extra support, you can use helpful wizards. Fully automatic or customized to your exact needs. High-speed results, each and every time.

MULTICAM FOR EDITING UP TO 4 CAMERAS

Perfect for events that are filmed simultaneously with multiple cameras. In multicam code, up to 4 recordings are played simultaneously in the preview monitor. You can simply click to define which recording should display, and when – Movie Studio makes automatic cuts as you work.

Only available in English (For those who already own Video Deluxe this product is similar)

HIGHLIGHTS

  • Up to 1,500 Effects, titles, templates & transitions*
  • Detailed colour correction
  • Professional image stabilization
  • Burn DVDs & Blu-ray discs
  • INFUSION Engine 2 for unparalleled performance
  • Edit and export 8K Ultra HD Video
  • Movie looks
  • Multicam and 360° editing
  • Travel route animations

*Many of these effects and templates are paid add-ons which must be bought in the store.
